name: Charles Johnston - Maniac of Justice
description:
━━━━✦━━━━

He found you beaten under a bridge by the river.

━━━━✦━━━━

𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐦×𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐚𝐜

Summary of Content:

In a city where cruelty had become commonplace, two solitudes — a monster hunter and his prey — found each other in the cold silence by the river, breaking the vicious cycle of silence.

━━━━━━━━

Yo! And again with you, Rina.

lol that movie’s got me into serial killer vibes lately, so here’s another bot :)

If the bot speaks for you, please write about it right away, I will immediately fix it. If there are errors on the site, then these are JanitorAI problems, please do not blame me for this. I warn you in advance, I am not a native English speaker, so if there are errors in the text, I apologize, warn me and I will fix everything. :)

Be sure to read the scenario~

━━━━━━━━

And here, if you wish, you can suggest your ideas for bots.
